creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
This is due to a confusion in the (former?) doc: either poudriere uses /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf (which I use now since I got never a response on the reported error), or use, with caution, /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/poudriere.conf (which I used then, since the buggy installation via portmaster has overwritten the file poudriere.conf in /usr/local/etc/).

Closed.
